title: Mavi Yaka
shortDescription: 670,000+ blue-collar jobs in 31 countries! Warehouse, factory, construction, logistics, security & more.
fullDescription:
Mavi Yaka is a comprehensive blue-collar job aggregator with over 670,000 listings across 31 countries.

Find jobs in warehouse, factory, construction, logistics, security, cleaning, delivery, and many more sectors — all in one app.

● 31 Countries
Browse jobs in the USA, UK, Germany, Turkey, India, Brazil, and 25 more countries.

● Updated Daily
Thousands of new listings added every day. Never miss an opportunity.

● Easy Search
Filter by sector, city, and position. Find the right job fast.

● Free to Use
All core features are completely free.
whatsNew:
v1.0.0 - Initial release!

● 670,000+ blue-collar jobs across 31 countries
● Warehouse, factory, construction, logistics, security sectors
● Easy search and filtering
